definition: All restaurant operations are digitally recorded, daily sales reports are accessible, and inventory stock is trackable in real-time.

metrics.name: Digital Order Recording Rate
metrics.measurement: Percentage of orders entered through POS system vs total orders

metrics.name: Daily Sales Report Availability
metrics.target: Automated daily sales summary accessible anytime
metrics.measurement: Owner can view accurate daily sales report within the system

metrics.name: Real-time Inventory Visibility
metrics.target: 100% — all inventory items tracked with real-time updates
metrics.measurement: Stock levels auto-update when orders are placed and ingredients are used

metrics.name: Inventory Loss Reduction
metrics.measurement: Difference between system stock and physical stock count during audits
